6:
SELECT 
  (MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN min_consumption END) - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN min_consumption END)) AS diff_SME_LAM,
  (MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN min_consumption END) - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN min_consumption END)) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  (MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN min_consumption END) - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN min_consumption END)) AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM (
  SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
  FROM (
    SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE ym.Date LIKE '2013%'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY ym.CustomerID
  )
  GROUP BY Segment
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT segment, pct_inc FROM (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) -
          SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END)) / 
         NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END),0) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
  FROM customers c
  JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
    AND (ym.Date LIKE '2012%' OR ym.Date LIKE '2013%')
    AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
  GROUP BY c.Segment
) 
ORDER BY pct_inc DESC LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT segment, pct_inc FROM (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) -
          SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END)) / 
         NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END),0) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
  FROM customers c
  JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
    AND (ym.Date LIKE '2012%' OR ym.Date LIKE '2013%')
    AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
  GROUP BY c.Segment
) 
ORDER BY pct_inc ASC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
